title: hoya flexuosa
intro: Hoya flexuosa, also known as the waxy hoya or flexuosa hoya, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Hoya flexuosa include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and skin care. Hoya flexuosa is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusions, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties, and its leaves can also be used in topical applications for skin and wound treatments.
